title: pilosella cymosa var. bauhini
intro: Pilosella cymosa var. bauhini, also known as Jacob's ladder, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the daisy family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory problems, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Pilosella cymosa var. bauhini can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal benefits and promote overall well-being.
